title: sabina indica
intro: Sabina indica, also known as the Saville oak or Prickly juniper, is a coniferous evergreen shrub native to the Himalayas and parts of India. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Sabina indica include relief from pain, fever reduction, and improved digestion, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and reduce stress levels. Sabina indica can be prepared into various herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
